pkgmetadata.longdescription: types-pysaml2This is a package containing type annotationsfor [pysaml2](httpspypi.orgprojectpysaml2). InstallingSimply run the following in the environment in which you want to install this packageshell install types-pysaml2 python -m pip install types-pysaml2or add it to your requirements file. DevelopingThis is a partial stub package, only covering a part of the functions and objects available in pysaml2.Contributions (both in adding stubs for more functions, or keeping up to date with pysaml2 itself) arewelcome.All the formatting is done using [pre-commit](httpspre-commit.com). To use this, run the followingshell install pre-commit python -m pip install pre-commit Set up the hooks (so pre-commit automatically runs when you do a commit) cd rootdirectoryofthepulledrepository pre-commit install This will run automatically whenever a commit is created To run it manually, use pre-commit run --all-files
